edgeLimit.description: Maximum number of edges to return (default 50)

endPoint.description: Only show paths ending at this step

excludeEvents.description: Events to exclude from the path

localPathCleaningFilters.description: Regex rules to clean/simplify path step names

pathGroupings.description: Wildcard groups to merge similar path steps

pathsHogQLExpression.description: A HogQL expression to use as the path step name. Requires includeEventTypes to contain "hogql".

startPoint.description: Only show paths starting at this step

chartSettings.description: Chart settings for non-table displays. Required in practice for line/bar/area charts so we can map HogQL columns to the X and Y axes.

seriesBreakdownColumn.description: Optional column used to split the data into multiple series (breakdown)

stackBars100.description: Whether to fill stacked bars to 100% (only for stacked bar charts)

xAxis.description: X axis column — for time-series line/area/bar charts, set this to the date/time column returned by the HogQL query

column.description: Name of the HogQL column (aliased in SELECT) to use for this axis or series

yAxis.description: Y axis series — one entry per numeric column to plot

column.description: Name of the HogQL column (aliased in SELECT) to use for this axis or series

display.description: Visualization type for the HogQL result. Defaults to ActionsTable when omitted — ALWAYS set this when the user asks for a chart (e.g. ActionsLineGraph for a line chart, ActionsBar for a bar chart, ActionsPie for a pie chart, BoldNumber for a single-value big-number card). Pair with `chartSettings.xAxis` / `chartSettings.yAxis` for line/bar/area charts so PostHog knows which HogQL columns to plot.

column.description: Name of the HogQL column (aliased in SELECT) to use for this axis or series
